div.h1: URL Path → Filesystem Path Security Pipeline

p.strong: Five-Stage Defense-in-Depth for Static File Serving

div.p: Attack Vector: Percent-Encoded Traversal Prevents bypasses where realpath or prefix checks fail to identify ../ because it remains encoded as %2e%2e.
Operation Combine Root + Path. doc_root = /var/www Result = /var/www + /../passwd
Operation (The Jail Guard) strncmp(canonical, root, len) == 0 Ensure path is still inside /var/www.

text.tspan: Only reached if prefix match passes.
